assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses compatibility, stating 'Istio 1.19+: Supports k8s 1.28-1.32' and 'Istio 1.18+: Supports k8s 1.27-1.29' and includes a compatibility check section

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes a 'Verify Istio Compatibility' section that explicitly checks if current Istio version supports k8s 1.32 and provides the compatibility matrix information

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response recommends upgrading GKE first, then Istio. It states 'Upgrade GKE First (1.31 → 1.32)' as step 1, which contradicts the expectation of upgrading Istio first when compatibility issues exist

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response does not mention mutating webhooks or explain how sidecar injection works during node drain/recreation scenarios

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses this through the monitoring section with 'kubectl get pods -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}{"\t"}{.spec.containers[?(@.name=="istio-proxy")].image}{"\n"}{end}' command to check proxy versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific monitoring commands to check proxy versions and provides a monitoring script that checks 'Proxy Versions' across the cluster

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check proxy versions and sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While the response mentions monitoring for version consistency, it does not explicitly warn about traffic disruption risks from version mismatches between control plane and sidecars
